title: WedDecor Shower Curtains Mould Proof Resistant, Waterproof PEVA Shower Curtain Heavy Duty Bathroom Curtains, With White 12 Plastic Hooks, 180cm x 180cm, Black
features: SHOWER CURTAIN SIZE: This shower curtain has a size of 180cm x 180cm. This versatile shower liner can be used as a standalone shower curtain or as a shower liner for a standard-size bathtub
SHOWER CURTAIN DESIGN: Ultra smooth specialty designs of a shower curtain, water swiftly rolls off the surface. It brings a beautiful visual effect to your bathroom, giving your bathroom a shiny feel
MATERIAL MADE: This shower curtain is made from PEVA (polyethylene vinyl acetate) material, It is a softer, durable, and waterproof material
WIDE APPLICATION: Fits many standard sizes of shower/bathtubs for your home, campers, hotels, motels, and more, and works with both straight and curved shower rods
WASH CARE: Use mild detergent and do not bleach, Handwash gently
description: Product Description What are the dimensions of this shower curtain? The shower curtain measures 180cm x 180cm, making it suitable for most standard-size bathtubs and showers. Can this shower curtain be used without a liner? Yes, it can be used either as a standalone shower curtain or as a liner behind a decorative curtain. What material is the shower curtain made from? It is made from PEVA material, a durable, waterproof, and PVC-free material that’s softer than traditional plastic curtains. Where can I use this shower curtain? This curtain is versatile and fits standard showers and bathtubs. It’s ideal for homes, hotels, motels, RVs, and campers. It also works with both straight and curved rods. How should I clean the shower curtain? Handwash gently using a mild detergent. Do not bleach. This helps maintain its smooth surface and prolongs its lifespan.
